name: HaulHQ
tagline: The command center for your reps hauls.
tagline_long: Real landed cost, cheapest-agent compare, and shareable haul lists.
one_liner: The only rep-buyer tool built around LANDED cost and agent economics, not just link-collecting.
aesthetic: Utilitarian trader terminal. Dark-first UI, mono-ish tabular numerics, sharp cards with hairline borders, one electric-lime accent reserved for savings and CTAs. Insider and blunt, built by someone who actually buys reps.

fonts.note: fontKey maps to the existing launchpad fonts.ts pairing. 'grotesk' = Space Grotesk for both display and text, which gives the technical/terminal feel while staying a single Google font load.

display.usage: Hero headlines, section titles, wordmark, big money-saved numbers.

text.usage: Body copy, labels, buttons, table cells.

numeric.family_stack: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, "SF Mono", Menlo, Consolas, "Liberation Mono", monospace
numeric.usage: Price/weight/landed-cost tables. Always apply font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums so columns align like a trading terminal.
numeric.css_snippet: font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, monospace; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;

palette.philosophy: Dark-first (default product/UI theme) with a light theme for docs, print haul summaries and OG light variant. Electric lime is the ONLY accent and is reserved for money-saved, savings deltas, primary CTAs and active states — never for decoration. Cyan is a secondary/info accent used sparingly for links and neutral highlights.

wcag_aa_pairs.context: dark: body text ink on bg
dark: lime savings number on bg
dark: lime savings on card surface
CTA button: dark ink on lime fill
light: savings green text on white
light CTA: dark ink on lime fill

usage_rules: Accent lime (#B8FF35) fills only the primary CTA and money-saved chips; text ON lime must be accentInk (#071008), never white.
In light theme, do NOT use lime as text on white (fails contrast) — use accentStrong green (#15723A) for savings text/links and keep lime for fills with dark ink.
Savings deltas are always positive-green; overpay/tax-hit deltas use danger red; de-minimis/customs risk warnings use warning amber.
Cards: 1px border in --border, no drop shadows in dark theme (glow only via accent on hover). Radius 10px.
Numbers in tables use the numeric mono stack with tabular-nums.

launchpad_css_vars.note: Feed these into the existing components/theme.ts brandToCssVars() as the Brand object (dark theme is the product default).

voice.personality: Insider, blunt, numeric, pro-buyer. Talks like a veteran rep buyer in a Discord you trust, not a SaaS landing page.
principles: Lead with the number. Money saved is the hero metric everywhere.
Use the community's real vocabulary: W2C, QC, de minimis, consolidation, haul, agent, shipping line, volumetric.
Be honest about limits (e.g. 'no live scraping yet') — trust is the moat with this audience.
Short, declarative sentences. No fluff, no corporate hedging, no emoji.
Second person. Speak to one buyer planning one haul.
do: You'd save $37 going with Agent X.
Your $540 haul lands at $611 after VAT. Here's the split that keeps you under de minimis.
Real landed cost. Before you pay.
Stop guessing your agent shipping. Compare the same cart across CNFans, Kakobuy and Superbuy.
dont: The ultimate all-in-one solution for enthusiasts.

logo.concept: Wordmark 'HaulHQ' with an 'HQ' terminal-cursor mark: a sharp bracket/box glyph evoking a command line + a shipping-crate corner, with a rising lime savings bar as the crossbar. Reads as 'command center' + 'money down / cost'.
logo.clearspace: Keep clear space equal to the cap-height of the 'H' on all sides.
variants: HQ monogram mark (isolate the left glyph)
single-color: use #F5F7F5 on dark, #0B0F10 on light
misuse: Do not recolor the accent bar to anything but lime (#B8FF35).
Do not add gradients or shadows.
Do not stretch or re-space the wordmark.
